name: Bone Basement Shortcut
coreLesson: Use one Digger on an obvious crumbly floor patch to reach a lower safe corridor.
funBeat: The apparent top route dead-ends; the crunchy-looking floor is the real path.
riskNotes: Keep the shaft fall within safe-fall limits or land directly on a lower platform.
Do not require exact pixel placement; make the dig patch wide and visually loud.
